title: System.Timers.Timer Has No .Tag Property
description: System.Timers.Timer does not have a .Tag property. Only System.Windows.Forms.Timer has .Tag. Auto-lock start time must be tracked via module-scoped variable ($script:_AutoLockStartTime) not timer.Tag.
notes: Regression detection: grep for .Tag on System.Timers.Timer objects. Crashed vault unlock in prior session.
